data.name: Fetish Locator Week Three
data.detailed_description:
Join our Discord


How Big Is Week 3?


關於此遊戲

The last chapter of Fetish Locator is finally here! Our girls are returning for one last ride filled with seduction and a lot of sex! Try to uncover all mysteries surrounding the Fetish Locator App. Romance more than 20 girls and discover more secrets as you shape the conclusion of your story in Fetish Locator Week 3.



They are back and thirstier than ever before! You know what these girls are capable of, so what kind of secrets are they going to reveal for you this one last time? Will you be able to satisfy all their fetishes?



Who is the creator of the famous Fetish Locator app? What is their motivation? Seek the truth behind the world’s sexiest app, but be prepared to deal with the consequences!



Your choices in previous games will influence how this story begins! Will your previous choices cause you more harm than good? How will it all end? And be prepared to make even more important choices that will define the conclusion of this epic saga!



Shape the conclusion of Week 3 based on how you play the game! How will your story end? Discover 6 possible endings with more to come in the future!



Week 3 is spicier and sexier than ever! It’s filled to the brim with even more sex and also the kinkiest fetishes of the saga. Experience the best Fetish Locator animations as the saga reaches its end. Ready for more Fetishes?

Integrated with Lovense Toys!

Experience the epic conclusion of the Fetish Locator Saga with more immersion and pleasure than ever before! Fully integrated will all Lovense toys, exploring your fetishes will reach new heights! Witness the conclusion of the trilogy with maximum pleasure!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

最低配備:

  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

Minimum:

  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 3 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 8 GB available space

  • OS: Windows 10

  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
